dependency_health.name: orders-db
dependency_health.impact_en: Connection pool nearing saturation and queueing transaction requests.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Le pool de connexions approche de la saturation et met les transactions en file.

dependency_health.name: payment-gateway
dependency_health.impact_en: Confirmation latency is higher than normal but still returning.
dependency_health.impact_fr: La latence de confirmation est superieure a la normale mais les reponses arrivent encore.

dependency_health.name: cart-cache
dependency_health.impact_en: Cache hit rate remains stable and is not driving the incident.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Le taux de hit du cache reste stable et ne pilote pas l'incident.

dependency_health.name: token-validator
dependency_health.impact_en: Validation misses and fallback cache lookups are increasing.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Les echecs de validation et les recherches de cache de secours augmentent.

dependency_health.name: session-store
dependency_health.impact_en: Session reads are normal and not the first driver of user impact.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Les lectures de session sont normales et ne sont pas le premier moteur d'impact utilisateur.

dependency_health.name: mobile-refresh-service
dependency_health.impact_en: Refresh requests are elevated and skewed toward older app versions.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Les requetes de rafraichissement sont elevees et biaisent vers d'anciennes versions d'application.

dependency_health.name: psp-gateway-eu
dependency_health.impact_en: Timeout ratio is elevated and retry storms are concentrating here.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Le ratio de timeout est eleve et les tempetes de relance se concentrent ici.

dependency_health.name: retry-queue
dependency_health.impact_en: Queue depth is growing faster than workers can drain.
dependency_health.impact_fr: La profondeur de file augmente plus vite que les workers ne peuvent la vider.

dependency_health.name: refund-service
dependency_health.impact_en: Dependent workflows are delayed but still processing.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Les workflows dependants sont retardes mais continuent de traiter.

dependency_health.name: risk-scoring
dependency_health.impact_en: Rules and anomaly scoring remain responsive.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Les regles et le scoring d'anomalie restent reactifs.

dependency_health.name: mfa-challenge
dependency_health.impact_en: Challenge issuance is normal but completion rate is dropping.
dependency_health.impact_fr: L'emission des challenges est normale mais le taux de completion baisse.

dependency_health.name: edge-waf
dependency_health.impact_en: Traffic filtering is active and supporting containment.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Le filtrage de trafic est actif et contribue au confinement.

dependency_health.name: orders-replica
dependency_health.impact_en: Replica lag is visible but no failover is required.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Le retard de la replica est visible mais aucun basculement n'est necessaire.

dependency_health.name: bi-export
dependency_health.impact_en: Analytical queries are contributing disproportionate CPU and lock pressure.
dependency_health.impact_fr: Les requetes analytiques contribuent de maniere disproportionnee a la pression CPU et aux verrous.

dependency_health.name: checkout-api
dependency_health.impact_en: Application latency is recovering but remains sensitive to query spikes.
dependency_health.impact_fr: La latence applicative se retablit mais reste sensible aux pics de requetes.
